description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CMake on multiple platforms that runs on push to master and dev branches and on pull requests to these branches. Use a matrix build job that runs on both ubuntu-latest and windows-latest, compiling with GCC, Clang, and MSVC in both Release and Debug configurations. For each configuration, check out the repository, configure CMake with the chosen compilers and build type, build the project, and run tests with ctest.
